content.content:
Web search results for query: "CSS masonry specification "Grid Integrated" "Grid Independent" 2024 2025"

Links: [{"title":"Help us choose the final syntax for Masonry in CSS | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/16026/css-masonry-syntax/"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about CSS masonry specification:

The CSS specification is drafted with two options competing — the "Grid Integrated" option and the "Grid Independent" option. In April 2024, work began on bringing Masonry layout to CSS, with a debate about whether the full power of CSS Grid (subgrid, spanning, explicit placement, and track sizing options) should be combined with masonry layout.

The CSSWG resolved to adopt mixed track-sizing for masonry-style layouts in September, representing significant progress toward standardization. However, an update from December 2025 notes that the debates described have been settled, and the newly named CSS Grid Lanes is the result of this resolution.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
